payload.label: rug
payload.short_description: light beige woven rug edge crop
payload.long_description: Light beige, low-pile woven floor rug with subtle mottled texture and low contrast pattern that fills most of the crop; the rug appears rectangular, the top edge is cut off by the image (edge-cropped) and a darker shadowed area is visible at the right — photographed from roughly 1.2 m above.
